about: SearchAgent exposes normalized provider search through MCP tools.

agent-card.description: Runs web search through SearchAgent providers and returns normalized result payloads.
agent-card.whenToUse: Use for web search, provider-backed retrieval, GPTResearcher web lookups, or OpenAI-compatible search calls.
agent-card.inputConventions: MCP uses provider, query, and optional maxResults. Chat completions use the request model as provider and the latest user message as query.
agent-card.outputConventions: Search results are normalized to JSON with ok, results, and provider metadata. Chat completions return that payload serialized as assistant text.
